clue/features/pkgmanager/configs

Imports

resolver

Types

NimbleDependency = object
  name*: string
  url*: string
  constraint*: VersionConstraint
  branch*: string
  tag*: string
  isNim*: bool
NimbleFile = object
  path*: string
  version*: string
  author*: string
  description*: string
  license*: string
  srcDir*: string
  binDir*: string
  bin*: seq[string]
  installDirs*: seq[string]
  installFiles*: seq[string]
  installExt*: seq[string]
  requires*: seq[NimbleDependency]
Package = object
  name*: string              ## The name of the package
  url*: string               ## The URL where the package can be found, such as a
                             ## GitHub repository or a package registry.
  tags*: seq[string] ## Additional metadata about the package, such as "web", "cli",
                     ## "database", etc.
  description*: string       ## A brief description of the package, its features, and use cases.
  license*: string ## The license under which the package is distributed, such as "MIT",
                   ## "GPL", "Apache", etc.
  web*: string               ## The URL of the package's website or documentation, if available.

Vars

clueDB: Store

Consts

clueDBPath = "/home/runner/.clue/clue.db"
cluePath = "/home/runner/.clue"
cluePkgsCachePath = "/home/runner/.clue/packages/_cache"
cluePkgsPath = "/home/runner/.clue/packages"
nimbleLocalPackages = "/home/runner/.nimble/packages_official.json"

Procs

proc initClue() {....raises: [OSError, IOError, StoreError, WalError, Exception,
                           KeyError, OpenParserJsonError, ValueError], tags: [
    WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect,
    TimeEffect], forbids: [].}

Templates

template withClueDB(stmt)
